g.text: - Browser extension extracts YT video url user is watching

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - Sends it to backend server, with auth key

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - Server returns a binary value:

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: if return 0 --> block video

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: if return 1 --> don't do anything

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: identify user. if that's fine go ahead.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Take the video url, use supadata api, and get video transcript.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Run that transcript via openrouter (model= openai/gpt-oss-120b:free)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: and than the model will either output 1, or 0. server just has to return

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: whatever that LLM returns. And deduct 1 credit from user's tottal credits
